app.name: DoubleShot
app.one_liner: A split node backend and electron main process enabling shared codebases between desktop and web applications.

screens.name: Main Window
screens.purpose: Hosts the primary application interface powered by the shared backend logic.
primary_actions: Launch Electron window with NestJS backend

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Persist application data using the shared backend service.

mvp_plan: week 1: Integrate NestJS with Electron main process
week 1: Set up monorepo with runner and builder packages
acceptance_tests: Electron window launches with NestJS backend running in main process
IPC communication between renderer and main processes works via NestJS transport
